scope: B9.2 prospective-acquisition PRE-ANALYSIS protocol (pre-registered, frozen BEFORE acquisition/analysis). Development-only, NO scientific/biological claim, NOT validation, NO tag.
estimand: under the pre-randomized, class-balanced, within-microblock audit contract, detect a condition-specific C x Z interaction in decoding the PRE-ASSIGNED cue Y_design, beyond known randomization variation. Natural prior shift / non-randomized condition / covariate confound / attrition-induced imbalance -> REFUSE (CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_OUT_OF_ESTIMAND).
decision_engine: B9.0 state machine + B9.2 trial_id-join acquisition adherence (csc/b9/acquisition_adherence.py). Contract-first, Z/T-blind validator; exact null resamples C* only within (subject, microblock, Y_design); byte-reused B3 contrast; alert = contract-valid AND estimable AND p_meanT<=0.025 AND p_stud<=0.025 AND n_eligible>=20. min_confirm_pairs=20 UNCHANGED.

cohort.stop_rule: >=24 analyzable OR all 30 slots exhausted; analyzable fixed by b9_stage2_quality_criteria.json, NEVER by p-values/effect sizes

adherence: executed rows join the pinned table on trial_id; every recorded trial must match its pinned (C,Y_design,subject,microblock). Attrition = missing trial_ids: balance-preserving -> reduced support; balance-breaking / prior-shifting -> CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_OUT_OF_ESTIMAND.

operations_checkpoint_6_10.purpose: logistics feasibility ONLY at an early 6-10 subject checkpoint
operations_checkpoint_6_10.enforcement: operations_checkpoint.checkpoint_report structurally never computes a p-value or alert (verified: checkpoint_blind_ok)
operations_checkpoint_6_10.action: may pause acquisition for logistics/support failure ONLY; may NEVER change the protocol based on signal (weak or strong)

A_contract_valid_null_audit.status: PENDING_ACQUISITION (governance-gated; NOT run in B9.0/B9.1A/B9.2 pre-acquisition)
A_contract_valid_null_audit.input: the real acquired >=24-analyzable cohort under the pinned assignment table
A_contract_valid_null_audit.reporting: single-cohort pilot -- NOT reported as a 300-cohort CP estimate
A_contract_valid_null_audit.main_question: given a genuine pre-recording randomized C x Y_design contract, does the exact null run fail-closed and avoid a false alert at alert-capable n>=20?

B_forced_violation.status: RUN (synthetic Z on corrupted copies of the pilot's manifest/table; machinery check, NOT biology)
B_forced_violation.expectation: every case -> CONTRACT_INVALID_OR_OUT_OF_ESTIMAND before any p-value

C_semisynthetic_positive.status: RUN as DIAGNOSTIC / power only (synthetic Z following the locked table; NOT a biological concept claim; on real Z once acquired)
C_semisynthetic_positive.expectation: at alert-capable n>=20 the pipeline can detect an injected boundary signal (power); the contract-valid null does NOT alert

success_screen_development.contract_execution: >=90% recorded trials match the assignment table before exclusions
success_screen_development.contract_valid_null_audit: no B9_CONCEPT_ALERT preferred; if an alert occurs -> STOP + diagnose exact-null / acquisition contract (NOT the gate)
success_screen_development.if_12_to_18_analyzable: INSUFFICIENT_LABELS_OR_SUPPORT -> acquisition-budget redesign; do NOT relax min_confirm_pairs

governance: human-EEG collection gated on institutional ethics/governance approval + consent + data-handling + lab-safety BEFORE any recording; NO data collected in B9.0/B9.1A/B9.2; not legal/IRB advice. See b9_stage2_governance_status.md.
